checkpoint_selection: highest unweighted manifest-v5 validation macro-F1 across mapped epoch zero and the pre-frozen four-epoch conditioned-head schedule
calibration: equal-source weighting across the six declared field validation sources, minimum temperature 1.0
expected_crop_source_in_product: trusted crop-cycle metadata supplied by the API request
test_disclosure: The architecture was selected and all numerical parameters were frozen from manifest-v5 validation. No v12 frozen-test image, label, logit, metric, threshold, calibration value, or per-example failure was inspected before this contract was frozen.
